creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can reproduce the problem, but this can not be fixed within graphviz

see also:
https://github.com/mapserver/mapserver/issues/5795


swig30 needs to be patched.

patch suggested:
https://github.com/swig/swig/pull/1238/files/03a2e2b6f74b518d8b4ade3169f7ed6544838a9b

Passing over to swig30 Maintainer.
